name: CMP_MKT_COMP_TYPE_CONFIG_VL
query: SELECT B.COMP_TYPE_CONFIG_ID, B.COMPENSATION_OBJECT, B.COMP_TYPE_ID, B.DISPLAY_SEQUENCE, TL.COMP_TYPE_DISPLAY_NAME, TL.MKT_TARGET_DISPLAY_NAME, B.ENABLE_COMP_TYPE_FLAG, B.ENABLE_MKT_TARGET_FLAG, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM CMP_MKT_COMP_TYPE_CONFIG_B B, CMP_MKT_COMP_TYPE_CONFIG_TL TL WHERE B.COMP_TYPE_CONFIG_ID = TL.COMP_TYPE_CONFIG_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
